## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.4

### 🔔 Notifications
- Keeps camera event notifications sending even when the selected recording-link option is off or a clip link is not available yet.
- Uses the X-Sense Recordings panel as the notification fallback target instead of silently skipping the mobile notification.
- Generates X-Sense Recordings deep links for motion and AI events without requiring the Home Assistant camera entity lookup to be available first.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Opens recording playback in a dedicated viewer page on mobile and desktop instead of playing video inline in the recordings list.
- Keeps viewer Back navigation returning to the X-Sense Recordings list before normal Home Assistant/browser navigation leaves the panel.

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Marks the previous broken camera notification blueprint copy as stale so Home Assistant can keep prompting users to refresh imported blueprints.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for recording deep links when the camera entity lookup is unavailable.
- Confirms the updated blueprint, repair checks, recording event path, and recordings panel syntax with focused tests.
